name: Hello World
description: A simple hello world plugin to demonstrate the TermulOS plugin store and installation flow.
author: TermulOS
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="hwGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF8C00;stop-opacity:1"/><stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#FF6347;stop-opacity:1"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="4" fill="url(#hwGrad)"/><text x="12" y="16.5" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white" font-family="sans-serif">Hi</text></svg>

name: Port Forwarder
description: Forward local ports to a remote SSH server via tunneling. Manage rules with toggle switches from the plugin or the system tray.
author: TermulOS
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="2" y="8" width="6" height="8" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.15"/><rect x="16" y="8" width="6" height="8" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.15"/><rect x="2" y="8" width="6" height="8" rx="1"/><rect x="16" y="8" width="6" height="8" rx="1"/><path d="M8 12h8"/><path d="M13 9l3 3-3 3"/><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1" fill="currentColor"/></svg>

name: Docker
description: Docker container management - manage containers, images, networks and volumes via SSH
author: TermulOS

name: iptables GUI
description: Visual firewall management for iptables - view, add, edit and delete rules across chains with a user-friendly interface.
author: TermulOS
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 256 256" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="fwGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8590C;stop-opacity:1"/><stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#FF6B35;stop-opacity:1"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="256" height="256" rx="48" fill="url(#fwGrad)"/><path d="M128 40 L200 72 L200 140 C200 180 168 210 128 224 C88 210 56 180 56 140 L56 72 Z" fill="white" opacity="0.95"/><path d="M128 80 C128 80 150 100 150 125 C150 140 142 155 128 160 C114 155 106 140 106 125 C106 100 128 80 128 80Z" fill="url(#fwGrad)"/><path d="M128 105 C128 105 140 118 140 130 C140 138 135 145 128 148 C121 145 116 138 116 130 C116 118 128 105 128 105Z" fill="white" opacity="0.9"/><rect x="100" y="172" width="56" height="6" rx="3" fill="url(#fwGrad)" opacity="0.6"/><rect x="110" y="184" width="36" height="6" rx="3" fill="url(#fwGrad)" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="105" y="196" width="46" height="6" rx="3" fill="url(#fwGrad)" opacity="0.3"/></svg>
